title: Second-metro domain expansion
whatChanged: Major operator widened nighttime service in a second U.S. city; cited remote-assistance and incident-response changes.
implication: Consistent with regulatory learning and repeatable expansion rather than one-city exception.
action: No size change; regulatory KPI weighted higher in next quarterly review.

title: Personal-auto carriers: loss-ratio noise
whatChanged: Large writers emphasized weather and severity; limited reference to pool frequency or ADS-linked exposure.
implication: Short thesis still early; timing risk of false negatives. Thesis intact; conviction on size until data align.
action: Short marked under review; risk limits tightened through next two prints.

title: OEM commentary: ADAS near term, L4 deferred
whatChanged: Several OEMs stressed monetizable ADAS and were noncommittal on urban L4 timelines.
implication: Weakens broad OEM-transition leg; reinforces compute and fleet-led exposure.
action: Closed legacy OEM long; redeployed to higher-conviction enabler sleeves.

title: Monitor initial publication
whatChanged: Published this tracker with KPI set and falsification list alongside case draft.
implication: Baseline for dated updates; entries should cite metric deltas where possible.
